title: holosepalum quadrangulum
intro: Holosepalum quadrangulum, also known as the four-angled holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Holosepalum quadrangulum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be made by boiling the leaves or roots in water or mixing the extracts with carrier oils for external use.
